findings.problem: The chapter spends most of its length in precise but familiar occupation setup, and the novel's singular speculative engine does not take control until the Bagshot footnote. That delays the sense that this opening is indispensable to this specific book rather than strong franchise atmosphere.
findings.rewrite_direction: Compress or differentiate one of the repeated arrival/feast passes at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:3, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:99, or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:155, and plant a concrete magical-law or manuscript-adjacent snag in Gavin's attention by snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:63 or snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:105 so the discovery at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:215 lands as escalation rather than first ignition.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if, before the chapter reaches snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:167, the revised text has already introduced a concrete, this-book-only disturbance in Gavin's attention or the world's magical logic, and the footnote scene beginning at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:215 reads as payoff or escalation of that disturbance. FAIL if the chapter still reads as standard occupied-Hogwarts setup until the library scene.

findings.problem: Once the chapter leaves the feast, the occupied-school pressure is too often conveyed by summary replacing scene. Dark Arts becomes desks-against-walls plus a burnt smell, corridor terror becomes an overview of changed traffic patterns, and the regime's daily bodily coercion is described around rather than fully inhabited. Given the style bible's explicit anti-sanitization rule, this is a high-severity craft miss.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the early-weeks block anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:169, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:173, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:203, replace at least one summary passage with a continuous Carrow-controlled episode that runs from trigger to bodily or social aftermath for Gavin, Duncan, or another student. Keep the Muggle Studies material if useful, but make one early occupation beat fully scenic rather than atmospheric overview.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised section anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:169, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:177, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:201 lets a reader identify one specific act of intimidation or cruelty, one specific bodily reaction, and one specific after-effect on student behavior without relying mainly on summary language. FAIL if the regime is still established primarily through montage, labels, and generalized schoolwide mood.

findings.problem: The chapter returns too often to the same sameness-versus-wrongness construction to describe occupation. After the strong first use, later repetitions become a visible prose formula and flatten the Great Hall, common room, and classroom material into one note.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise at least two of the repeated template beats at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:155, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:159, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:203 so each location's altered state is carried by different concrete sensory or social evidence instead of another version of the same but wrong formula.
findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised chapter uses this sameness-wrongness template no more than twice across the sections anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:99, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:155, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:159, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_01.md:203, and if each location's unease is legible through distinct observable cues. FAIL if three or more of those beats still hinge on the same abstract equivalence.

summary: Atmosphere, close-third focalization, and character differentiation are strong, and Gavin, Miren, and Duncan mostly stay aligned with the style bible's dialogue and contraction profiles. The chapter still falls short on award, craft, and prose because its distinctive engine arrives late, the early-weeks occupation material retreats into summary where the risk policy calls for embodied pressure, and the prose leans too often on a same-but-wrong descriptive formula.
